title: Frontline: Block Warfare
description: Team-based combat with vehicles, weapons, and strategy.
body:
💥 Frontline: Minecraft Warfare

Frontline: Minecraft Warfare is a large-scale combat modpack built around modern warfare 🔫, tactical gameplay 🧠, and immersive multiplayer experiences 🌍. Designed for factions, team-based servers, and organized battles, this pack transforms Minecraft into a living battlefield where strategy, coordination, and firepower decide the outcome.

⚔️ Advanced Combat & Weaponry

At the core of Frontline is Superb Warfare, Warborn, and [SBW] MCSP – Addon, delivering advanced weapons, military gear, and expanded combat systems. [TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero introduces polished, realistic firearms with smooth handling and deep customization 🔧, making every engagement feel impactful and skill-based.

🚙 Vehicles & Warfare Technology

AshVehicle brings drivable military vehicles into the fight, allowing players to deploy tanks, transports, and support units directly onto the battlefield. Combined with large open maps and urban ruins, battles scale from tight hallway fights to massive armored assaults 💣.

🏙️ Urban Warfare & Defense

The Lost Cities generates sprawling ruined cities perfect for close-quarters combat, ambushes, and sieges. Players can fortify and defend territory using SecurityCraft 🔐, setting up cameras, reinforced doors, and alarms, while Simply Traps enables deadly ambushes and perimeter control ⚠️.

🎧 Immersion & Teamplay

Real-time communication via Simple Voice Chat allows squads to coordinate pushes, call targets, and command units mid-fight 🎙️. 3D Skin Layers and GeckoLib enhance player models and animations, making combat feel cinematic and alive 🎬.

⚙️ Performance & Stability

Behind the scenes, Entity Culling and FerriteCore keep performance smooth even during large-scale battles 🚀. Curios API expands equipment slots, letting players customize tactical loadouts and gear 🎒.

Frontline: Minecraft Warfare is built for players who want organized chaos, tactical depth, and unforgettable battlefield moments — where every block, bullet, and decision matters. 💥
